This file is a merged representation of a subset of the codebase, containing specifically included files and files not matching ignore patterns, combined into a single document by Repomix.
The content has been processed where line numbers have been added.

================================================================
File Summary
================================================================

Purpose:
--------
This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.

File Format:
------------
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files (if enabled)
5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
  a. A separator line (================)
  b. The file path (File: path/to/file)
  c. Another separator line
  d. The full contents of the file
  e. A blank line

Usage Guidelines:
-----------------
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.

Notes:
------
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Only files matching these patterns are included: **/*.cs, **/*.csproj, **/*.sln, **/*.json, **/*.sql, **/*.md, **/Dockerfile, **/.dockerignore
- Files matching these patterns are excluded: **/bin/**, **/obj/**, **/.vs/**, **/.vscode/**, **/TestResults/**, **/*.user, **/*.suo, **/AppPackages/**, **/BundleArtifacts/**, **/dist/**, **/node_modules/**, **/Migrations/**, **/appsettings.Development.json, **/appsettings.Local.json, repomix-output.txt
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)

src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/ArticleMetadataConfiguration.cs

src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/CommentConfiguration.cs
src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/IngestionRunConfiguration.cs
src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/RoleConfiguration.cs

src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/UserTopicFilterConfiguration.cs
src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Seeding/DataSeeder.cs
src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/PositiveNews.Infrastructure.csproj

src/PositiveNews.WebApi/Properties/launchSettings.json

Files
================================================================

================
File: MSSQLSDBInitial.sql
================
  1: /* ==========================================================================
  2:    POSITIVE NEWS DATABASE - INITIAL SETUP
  3:    ==========================================================================
  4:    Description: 
  5:    Creates the schema for the PositiveNews aggregator MVP.
  6:    Includes Vertical Partitioning for Articles, Unified Audit Logging,
  7:    and preparation for future Social Auth.
  8:    ========================================================================== */
  9: 
 10: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
 11:    1. SCHEMAS
 12:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
 13: -- Organizing tables by domain context.
 14: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Admin') EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA [Admin]')
 15: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Catalog') EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA [Catalog]')
 16: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Community') EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA [Community]')
 17: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Identity') EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA [Identity]')
 18: GO
 19: 
 20: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
 21:    2. INDEPENDENT TABLES (Dictionaries & Core Entities)
 22:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
 23: 
 24: -- [Identity].[Roles]
 25: -- Simple lookup for permissions.
 26: CREATE TABLE [Identity].[Roles](
 27:     [Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
 28:     [Name] [nvarchar](50) NOT NULL UNIQUE -- Enum-like (e.g., 'Admin', 'User', 'Moderator')
 29: );
 30: GO
 31: 
 32: -- [Catalog].[Topics]
 33: -- The categories articles belong to (e.g., 'Technology', 'Health').
 34: CREATE TABLE [Catalog].[Topics](
 35:     [Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
 36:     [Name] [nvarchar](200) NOT NULL,
 37:     [Slug] [nvarchar](200) NOT NULL UNIQUE, -- For pretty URLs (e.g., /topic/clean-energy)
 38:     [Description] [nvarchar](500) NULL
 39: );
 40: GO
 41: 
 42: -- [Identity].[Users]
 43: -- The core user identity table.
 44: CREATE TABLE [Identity].[Users](
 45:     [Id] [bigint] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
 46:     [Email] [nvarchar](300) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
 47:     [EmailConfirmed] [bit] NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, -- Critical for preventing bot spam in comments.
 48:     [Name] [nvarchar](200) NOT NULL,
 49:     
 50:     -- SECURITY NOTE: Nullable to support future Social Auth (Google/Apple).
 51:     
 52:     [PasswordHash] [nvarchar](max) NULL, 
 53:     [LastLoginAt] [datetime2](7) NULL,
 54:     [FailedLoginCount] [int] NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, -- Security: Used to lock account after too many tries.
 55:     [AvatarPictureUrl] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
 56:     [CreatedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL DEFAULT sysutcdatetime(),
 57:     [IsActive] [bit] NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
 58:     [ModeratedBy] [bigint] NULL -- Self-referencing FK (defined later) to track who banned/approved this user.
 59: );
 60: GO
 61: 
 62: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
 63:    3. CATALOG & CONTENT TABLES
 64:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
 65: 
 66: -- [Catalog].[Sources]
 67: -- Represents RSS feeds or APIs (e.g., Reuters, BBC).
 68: CREATE TABLE [Catalog].[Sources](
 69:     [Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
 70:     [Name] [nvarchar](200) NOT NULL,
 71:     [Description] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
 72:     [BaseUrl] [nvarchar](500) NOT NULL,
 73:     [FeedUrl] [nvarchar](500) NULL,
 74:     [LogoUrl] [nvarchar](500) NULL,
 75:     [ApiEndpoint] [nvarchar](500) NULL,
 76:     
 77:     -- SECURITY: There is no intention to store API keys in clear text. 
 78:     -- Application must encrypt this before saving and decrypt in memory when used.
 79: 
 80:     [ApiEncryptedKey] [nvarchar](max) NULL, 
 81:     
 82:     [TrustScore] [decimal](5, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0, -- Weighting factor for the algorithm.
 83:     [DefaultLanguageCode] [nvarchar](10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en', -- Template for incoming articles.
 84:     [CreatedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL DEFAULT sysutcdatetime(),
 85:     [IsActive] [bit] NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
 86:     [ModeratedBy] [bigint] NULL,
 87:     
 88:     CONSTRAINT [FK_Sources_Moderator] FOREIGN KEY([ModeratedBy]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id])
 89: );
 90: GO
 91: 
 92: -- [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata]
 93: -- The "Light" table. Contains only searchable fields.
 94: -- Vertical Partitioning Strategy: Keeping this small makes feed queries fast.
 95: CREATE TABLE [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata](
 96:     [Id] [bigint] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
 97:     [SourceId] [int] NOT NULL,
 98:     [ExternalId] [nvarchar](300) NULL, -- The ID provided by the Source (RSS GUID).
 99:     [Title] [nvarchar](500) NOT NULL,
100:     [Author] [nvarchar](300) NULL,
101:     [Url] [nvarchar](1000) NOT NULL,
102:     [ImageUrl] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
103:     
104:     -- TIMESTAMPS: PublishedAt is NOT NULL because sorting by "Unknown Date" breaks the feed UI.
105:     [PublishedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL DEFAULT sysutcdatetime(), 
106:     [IngestedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL DEFAULT sysutcdatetime(),
107:     
108:     -- ANALYSIS: Nullable because analysis happens asynchronously after ingestion.
109:     [AnalyzedAt] [datetime2](7) NULL, 
110:     [PositivityScore] [decimal](5, 4) NULL, -- 0.0000 to 1.0000
111:     
112:     [ViewCount] [bigint] NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
113:     
114:     -- LOCALIZATION: Defaults 'und' (Undefined) and 'Global' allow the Ingestor to save 
115:     -- the article immediately, even if language detection absent.
116:     [LanguageCode] [nvarchar](10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'und', 
117:     [RegionCode] [nvarchar](10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Global',
118:     
119:     [IsActive] [bit] NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
120:     [ModeratedBy] [bigint] NULL,
121: 
122:     CONSTRAINT [FK_ArticlesMeta_Source] FOREIGN KEY([SourceId]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[Sources]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
123:     CONSTRAINT [FK_ArticlesMeta_Moderator] FOREIGN KEY([ModeratedBy]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id])
124: );
125: GO
126: 
127: -- [Catalog].[ArticlesContent]
128: -- The "Heavy" table. Contains blobs of text. 
129: -- Split from Metadata to reduce IO usage when listing articles.
130: CREATE TABLE [Catalog].[ArticlesContent](
131:     [Id] [bigint] NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, -- 1-to-1 Relationship with Metadata
132:     
133:     -- NULLABLE JUSTIFICATION:
134:     -- 1. Ingestion saves Metadata first (Content is NULL).
135:     -- 2. Background worker scrapes the URL (ContentRaw populated).
136:     -- 3. AI cleans the text (ContentClean populated).
137:     -- If these were NOT NULL, the initial ingestion would fail.
138:     [ContentRaw] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
139:     [ContentClean] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
140:     [SummaryShort] [nvarchar](2000) NULL,
141: 
142:     CONSTRAINT [FK_ArticlesContent_Meta] FOREIGN KEY([Id]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
143: );
144: GO
145: 
146: -- [Catalog].[IngestionRuns]
147: -- Logs the execution of the background scraper.
148: CREATE TABLE [Catalog].[IngestionRuns](
149:     [Id] [bigint] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
150:     [SourceId] [int] NOT NULL,
151:     [StartedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL,
152:     [FinishedAt] [datetime2](7) NULL,
153:     [Status] [nvarchar](50) NOT NULL, -- Enum stored as String: 'Running', 'Success', 'Failed'
154:     [ItemsFetched] [int] NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
155:     [ErrorMessage] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
156: 
157:     CONSTRAINT [FK_IngestionRuns_Source] FOREIGN KEY([SourceId]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[Sources]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
158: );
159: GO
160: 
161: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
162:    4. COMMUNITY & INTERACTION TABLES
163:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
164: 
165: -- [Community].[Comments]
166: CREATE TABLE [Community].[Comments](
167:     [Id] [bigint] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
168:     [ArticleId] [bigint] NOT NULL,
169:     [UserId] [bigint] NOT NULL,
170:     [ParentId] [bigint] NULL, -- For threaded replies.
171:     [Content] [nvarchar](2000) NOT NULL, -- Security: Prevent "Text Bloat" attacks.
172:     [CreatedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL DEFAULT sysutcdatetime(),
173:     [EditedAt] [datetime2](7) NULL,
174:     [IsActive] [bit] NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
175:     [ModeratedBy] [bigint] NULL,
176: 
177:     CONSTRAINT [FK_Comments_Article] FOREIGN KEY([ArticleId]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
178:     CONSTRAINT [FK_Comments_User] FOREIGN KEY([UserId]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id]), 
179:     CONSTRAINT [FK_Comments_Parent] FOREIGN KEY([ParentId]) REFERENCES [Community].[Comments]([Id]), 
180:     CONSTRAINT [FK_Comments_Moderator] FOREIGN KEY([ModeratedBy]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id])
181: );
182: GO
183: 
184: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
185:    5. JUNCTION TABLES (Relationships)
186:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
187: 
188: -- [Identity].[UserRoles] (Many-to-Many)
189: CREATE TABLE [Identity].[UserRoles](
190:     [UserId] [bigint] NOT NULL,
191:     [RoleId] [int] NOT NULL,
192:     PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([UserId] ASC, [RoleId] ASC),
193: 
194:     CONSTRAINT [FK_UserRoles_User] FOREIGN KEY([UserId]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
195:     CONSTRAINT [FK_UserRoles_Role] FOREIGN KEY([RoleId]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Roles]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
196: );
197: GO
198: 
199: -- [Catalog].[ArticleTopics] (Many-to-Many)
200: CREATE TABLE [Catalog].[ArticleTopics](
201:     [ArticleId] [bigint] NOT NULL,
202:     [TopicId] [int] NOT NULL,
203:     PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([ArticleId] ASC, [TopicId] ASC),
204:     
205:     CONSTRAINT [FK_ArticleTopics_Article] FOREIGN KEY([ArticleId]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
206:     CONSTRAINT [FK_ArticleTopics_Topic] FOREIGN KEY([TopicId]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[Topics]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
207: );
208: GO
209: 
210: -- [Identity].[UserSourceFilters] (Many-to-Many)
211: -- Users can "Mute" or "Follow" specific sources.
212: CREATE TABLE [Identity].[UserSourceFilters](
213:     [UserId] [bigint] NOT NULL,
214:     [SourceId] [int] NOT NULL,
215:     PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([UserId] ASC, [SourceId] ASC),
216: 
217:     CONSTRAINT [FK_UserSourceFilters_User] FOREIGN KEY([UserId]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
218:     CONSTRAINT [FK_UserSourceFilters_Source] FOREIGN KEY([SourceId]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[Sources]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
219: );
220: GO
221: 
222: -- [Identity].[UserTopicFilters] (Many-to-Many)
223: CREATE TABLE [Identity].[UserTopicFilters](
224:     [UserId] [bigint] NOT NULL,
225:     [TopicId] [int] NOT NULL,
226:     PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([UserId] ASC, [TopicId] ASC),
227: 
228:     CONSTRAINT [FK_UserTopicFilters_User] FOREIGN KEY([UserId]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
229:     CONSTRAINT [FK_UserTopicFilters_Topic] FOREIGN KEY([TopicId]) REFERENCES [Catalog].[Topics]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
230: );
231: GO
232: 
233: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
234:    6. USER PREFERENCES
235:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
236: 
237: -- [Identity].[UserFeedPreferences]
238: -- Stores the personalization settings for the user's feed.
239: CREATE TABLE [Identity].[UserFeedPreferences](
240:     [UserId] [bigint] NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
241:     [MinPositivity] [decimal](3, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.5, -- The core feature: Filter out negative news.
242:     [SortBy] [nvarchar](50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Date', -- Enum: 'Date', 'Popularity', 'Positivity'
243:     [LanguageCode] [nvarchar](10) NULL, -- The language filter may be missing or none.
244:     [RegionCode] [nvarchar](10) NULL, -- May be missing or none.
245: 
246:     CONSTRAINT [FK_UserPrefs_User] FOREIGN KEY([UserId]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
247: );
248: GO
249: 
250: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
251:    7. ADMIN & AUDITING
252:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
253: 
254: -- [Admin].[AuditLogs]
255: -- Unified table for all moderation actions (Banning users, Deleting comments, etc.)
256: CREATE TABLE [Admin].[AuditLogs](
257:     [Id] [bigint] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
258:     [EntityType] [nvarchar](50) NOT NULL, -- Enum: 'Article', 'Comment', 'User'
259:     [EntityId] [bigint] NOT NULL,         -- Stores the ID of the object being modified.
260:     [ChangedField] [nvarchar](100) NULL,  -- e.g., 'IsActive', 'Title', 'SummaryShort'
261:     [OldValue] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
262:     [NewValue] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
263:     [Reason] [nvarchar](500) NULL,        -- Why was this done? (e.g., 'Hate Speech')
264:     [Note] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,         -- Moderator internal notes.
265:     [ModeratorId] [bigint] NOT NULL,
266:     [CreatedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL DEFAULT sysutcdatetime(),
267: 
268:     CONSTRAINT [FK_AuditLogs_Moderator] FOREIGN KEY([ModeratorId]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id])
269: );
270: GO
271: 
272: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
273:    8. FINAL CONSTRAINTS
274:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
275: ALTER TABLE [Identity].[Users] 
276: ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Users_ModeratedBy] FOREIGN KEY([ModeratedBy]) REFERENCES [Identity].[Users]([Id]);
277: GO
278: 
279: /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
280:    9. PERFORMANCE INDEXES
281:    -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
282: 
283: -- FEED PERFORMANCE: "Show me the latest positive news"
284: -- Includes 'PositivityScore' to filter negative news instantly without table lookups.
285: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_ArticlesMeta_Feed_Date] 
286: ON [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata] ([LanguageCode], [RegionCode], [PublishedAt] DESC)
287: INCLUDE ([Title], [ImageUrl], [SourceId], [PositivityScore], [ViewCount])
288: WHERE [IsActive] = 1;
289: GO
290: 
291: -- Optimization for "Source Profile" pages (e.g., /source/reuters).
292: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_ArticlesMeta_SourceId]
293: ON [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata] ([SourceId])
294: INCLUDE ([PublishedAt], [IsActive]); -- Include IsActive to filter deleted items quickly.
295: GO
296: 
297: -- TOPIC LOOKUP: "Show me all articles about Technology"
298: -- Essential because the PK is (ArticleId, TopicId). This creates the reverse lookup.
299: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_ArticleTopics_Topic_Lookup] 
300: ON [Catalog].[ArticleTopics] ([TopicId])
301: INCLUDE ([ArticleId]);
302: GO
303: 
304: -- DEDUPLICATION: "Does this article already exist?"
305: -- Used by the Ingestion Engine to prevent inserting duplicates.
306: CREATE UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_ArticlesMeta_Source_ExternalId] 
307: ON [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata] ([SourceId], [ExternalId])
308: WHERE [ExternalId] IS NOT NULL;
309: GO
310: 
311: -- HISTORY: "Show me audit logs for this specific article"
312: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_AuditLogs_Entity_History] 
313: ON [Admin].[AuditLogs] ([EntityType], [EntityId], [CreatedAt] DESC);
314: GO
315: 
316: -- COMMENTS: "Load comments for this article"
317: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Comments_Article_Thread] 
318: ON [Community].[Comments] ([ArticleId], [CreatedAt] ASC)
319: INCLUDE ([UserId], [Content])
320: WHERE [IsActive] = 1;
321: GO
322: 
323: -- 10. ENFORCE DATA INTEGRITY (Check Constraints)
324: -- Prevents "Impossible" numbers from breaking the algorithm.
325: 
326: ALTER TABLE [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata]
327: ADD CONSTRAINT [CK_Articles_Positivity] CHECK ([PositivityScore] BETWEEN 0.0000 AND 1.0000);
328: GO
329: 
330: ALTER TABLE [Catalog].[Sources]
331: ADD CONSTRAINT [CK_Sources_Trust] CHECK ([TrustScore] >= 0.00);
332: GO
333: 
334: ALTER TABLE [Identity].[UserFeedPreferences]
335: ADD CONSTRAINT [CK_UserPrefs_MinPositivity] CHECK ([MinPositivity] BETWEEN 0.00 AND 1.00);
336: GO
337: 
338: -- 11. ENFORCE ENUM INTEGRITY (Without Lookup Tables)
339: -- Ensures only valid strings are saved.
340: 
341: ALTER TABLE [Catalog].[IngestionRuns]
342: ADD CONSTRAINT [CK_Ingestion_Status] CHECK ([Status] IN ('Running', 'Success', 'Failed', 'Partial'));
343: GO
344: 
345: ALTER TABLE [Admin].[AuditLogs]
346: ADD CONSTRAINT [CK_Audit_Entity] CHECK ([EntityType] IN ('Article', 'Comment', 'User', 'Source'));
347: -- To be supplemented...
348: GO
349: 
350: --12. Create a View for main news feed to keep LINQ queries simple.
351: 
352: CREATE VIEW [Catalog].[vArticleFeed] AS
353: SELECT 
354:     m.Id, m.Title, m.ImageUrl, m.PublishedAt, m.PositivityScore,
355:     s.Name AS SourceName, s.LogoUrl AS SourceLogo,
356:     (SELECT STRING_AGG(t.Name, ', ') 
357:      FROM [Catalog].[ArticleTopics] at 
358:      JOIN [Catalog].[Topics] t ON at.TopicId = t.Id 
359:      WHERE at.ArticleId = m.Id) AS TopicList
360: FROM [Catalog].[ArticlesMetadata] m
361: JOIN [Catalog].[Sources] s ON m.SourceId = s.Id
362: WHERE m.IsActive = 1;

================
File: README.md
================
 1: Project Title: "PositiveNews".
 2: 
 3: Level: Educational.
 4: Status: Development.
 5: 
 6: Description: 
 7: A web platform combats "doom-scrolling" by aggregating news from various sources, 
 8: store them, and ranking them based on calculated score. Provides UI for viewing news sorted 
 9: by positivity
10: 
11: The "PositiveNews" features List:
12: 1. Ingestion Engine: Receiving news from various sources.
13: 2. Content Distiller: Get the core news text and short 1min-read summary.
14: 3. Secure Storage: Storing articles, summaries, and metadata in a structured database.
15: 4. Sentiment Assessor: Scoring articles for "positivity" (0.0 to 1.0).
16: 5. Configurable Feed: Public visibility of with a global "positivity" threshold.
17: 6. User Personalization: Authorized users can set their own positivity metrics.
18: 7. Adaptive Reader: Toggle between "Summary" and "Full Article" views.
19: 8. Community Interaction: Leaving and viewing comments on articles.
20: 9. Admin Command Center: Operations for article, sources list editing and comment moderation.
21: 10. Source Filtering: Narrowing the feed to specific trusted publishers (e.g., "Only Reuters").
22: 11. Topic Filtering: Categorizing news by domain (e.g., "Technology," "Health").
23: 12. Topics Sorting: By publication date, or "positivity" score.
24: 13. Automatic logging: Logging of operations with writing to stored text files.

================
File: repomix.config.json
================
 1: {
 2:   "output": {
 3:     "filePath": "repomix-output.txt",
 4:     "style": "plain",
 5:     "removeComments": false,
 6:     "removeEmptyLines": false,
 7:     "showLineNumbers": true,
 8:     "copyToClipboard": false
 9:   },
10:   "include": [
11:     "**/*.cs",
12:     "**/*.csproj",
13:     "**/*.sln",
14:     "**/*.json",
15:     "**/*.sql",
16:     "**/*.md",
17:     "**/Dockerfile",
18:     "**/.dockerignore"
19:   ],
20:   "ignore": {
21:     "customPatterns": [
22:       "**/bin/**",
23:       "**/obj/**",
24:       "**/.vs/**",
25:       "**/.vscode/**",
26:       "**/TestResults/**",
27:       "**/*.user",
28:       "**/*.suo",
29:       "**/AppPackages/**",
30:       "**/BundleArtifacts/**",
31:       "**/dist/**",
32:       "**/node_modules/**",
33:       "**/Migrations/**",
34:       "**/appsettings.Development.json",
35:       "**/appsettings.Local.json",
36:       "repomix-output.txt"
37:     ],
38:     "useGitignore": true,
39:     "useDefaultPatterns": true
40:   },
41:   "security": {
42:     "enableChecking": true
43:   }
44: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Application/DependencyInjection.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
 2: 
 3: namespace PositiveNews.Application;
 4: 
 5: /// <summary>
 6: /// Clean Registration Pattern for the Application layer.
 7: /// Will host service registrations when Application-level services appear.
 8: /// </summary>
 9: public static class DependencyInjection
10: {
11:     public static IServiceCollection AddApplicationServices(this IServiceCollection services)
12:     {
13:         // Future: AutoMapper profiles, FluentValidation validators, etc.
14:         return services;
15:     }
16: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Application/DTOs/RssFeedItemDto.cs
================
 1: namespace PositiveNews.Application.DTOs;
 2: 
 3: /// <summary>
 4: /// Represents a single item parsed from an RSS feed.
 5: /// This DTO is source-agnostic and carries only the data the ingestion pipeline needs.
 6: /// </summary>
 7: public class RssFeedItemDto
 8: {
 9:     public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
10:     public string Link { get; set; } = string.Empty;
11:     public string? Description { get; set; }
12:     public string? Author { get; set; }
13:     public DateTime? PublishedDate { get; set; }
14:     public string? ExternalId { get; set; }     // RSS <guid> or <link> as fallback
15:     public string? ImageUrl { get; set; }
16: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Application/Interfaces/IIngestionService.cs
================
 1: namespace PositiveNews.Application.Interfaces;
 2: 
 3: /// <summary>
 4: /// Orchestrates the ingestion cycle: fetches feeds from all active sources,
 5: /// deduplicates, and persists new articles.
 6: /// </summary>
 7: public interface IIngestionService
 8: {
 9:     Task RunIngestionCycleAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
10: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Application/Interfaces/IRssFeedReader.cs
================
 1: using PositiveNews.Application.DTOs;
 2: 
 3: namespace PositiveNews.Application.Interfaces;
 4: 
 5: /// <summary>
 6: /// Abstracts RSS feed fetching so the service can be tested without HTTP calls.
 7: /// </summary>
 8: public interface IRssFeedReader
 9: {
10:     /// <summary>
11:     /// Fetches and parses an RSS/Atom feed from the given URL.
12:     /// </summary>
13:     Task<IReadOnlyList<RssFeedItemDto>> ReadFeedAsync(string feedUrl, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
14: }

15:   </ItemGroup>

File: src/PositiveNews.Domain/Constants/SchemaNames.cs

 1: namespace PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 2: 
 3: /// <summary>
 4: /// Centralizes SQL schema names to avoid magic strings in EF configurations.
 5: /// </summary>
 6: public static class SchemaNames
 7: {
 8:     public const string Identity = "Identity";
 9:     public const string Catalog = "Catalog";
10:     public const string Community = "Community";
11:     public const string Admin = "Admin";
12: }

 1: using System.Xml.Linq;
 2: 
 3: namespace PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 4: 
 5: public class ArticleMetadata
 6: {
 7:     public long Id { get; set; }
 8:     public int SourceId { get; set; }
 9:     public string? ExternalId { get; set; }
10:     public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
11:     public string? Author { get; set; }
12:     public string Url { get; set; } = string.Empty;
13:     public string? ImageUrl { get; set; }
14:     public DateTime PublishedAt { get; set; }
15:     public DateTime IngestedAt { get; set; }
16:     public DateTime? AnalyzedAt { get; set; }
17:     public decimal? PositivityScore { get; set; }
18:     public long ViewCount { get; set; }
19:     public string LanguageCode { get; set; } = "und";
20:     public string RegionCode { get; set; } = "Global";
21:     public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
22:     public long? ModeratedBy { get; set; }
23: 
24:     // Navigation
25:     public Source Source { get; set; } = null!;
26:     public User? Moderator { get; set; }
27:     public ArticleContent? Content { get; set; }
28:     public ICollection<ArticleTopic> ArticleTopics { get; set; } = new List<ArticleTopic>();
29:     public ICollection<Comment> Comments { get; set; } = new List<Comment>();
30: }

 7:     public string? Description { get; set; }
 8:     public string BaseUrl { get; set; } = string.Empty;
 9:     public string? FeedUrl { get; set; }
10:     public string? LogoUrl { get; set; }
11:     public string? ApiEndpoint { get; set; }
12:     public string? ApiEncryptedKey { get; set; }
13:     public decimal TrustScore { get; set; } = 1.0m;
14:     public string DefaultLanguageCode { get; set; } = "en";

 9:     public bool EmailConfirmed { get; set; }
10:     public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
11:     public string? PasswordHash { get; set; }

13:     public int FailedLoginCount { get; set; }
14:     public string? AvatarPictureUrl { get; set; }
15:     public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
16:     public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
17:     public long? ModeratedBy { get; set; }

25:     public ICollection<Comment> Comments { get; set; } = new List<Comment>();
26: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Domain/PositiveNews.Domain.csproj
================
1: <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
2: 
3:   <PropertyGroup>
4:     <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework>
5:     <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
6:     <Nullable>enable</Nullable>

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/BackgroundJobs/IngestionBackgroundService.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
 2: using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
 3: using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
 4: using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
 5: using PositiveNews.Application.Interfaces;
 6: 
 7: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.BackgroundJobs;
 8: 
 9: /// <summary>
10: /// A long-running hosted service that periodically triggers the ingestion cycle.
11: /// Interval is configurable via "Ingestion:IntervalMinutes" in appsettings.json.
12: /// </summary>
13: public class IngestionBackgroundService : BackgroundService
14: {
15:     private readonly IServiceScopeFactory _scopeFactory;
16:     private readonly ILogger<IngestionBackgroundService> _logger;
17:     private readonly TimeSpan _interval;
18: 
19:     /// <summary>
20:     /// Initial delay before the first run so the application has time to fully start.
21:     /// </summary>
22:     private static readonly TimeSpan InitialDelay = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(15);
23: 
24:     public IngestionBackgroundService(
25:         IServiceScopeFactory scopeFactory,
26:         ILogger<IngestionBackgroundService> logger,
27:         IConfiguration configuration)
28:     {
29:         _scopeFactory = scopeFactory;
30:         _logger = logger;
31: 
32:         var minutes = configuration.GetValue<int>("Ingestion:IntervalMinutes", 60);
33:         _interval = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(minutes);
34:     }
35: 
36:     protected override async Task ExecuteAsync(CancellationToken stoppingToken)
37:     {
38:         _logger.LogInformation(
39:             "Ingestion Background Service started. Interval: {Interval}. Initial delay: {Delay}.",
40:             _interval, InitialDelay);
41: 
42:         // Wait for the application to fully initialize before the first run.
43:         await Task.Delay(InitialDelay, stoppingToken);
44: 
45:         while (!stoppingToken.IsCancellationRequested)
46:         {
47:             try
48:             {
49:                 using var scope = _scopeFactory.CreateScope();
50:                 var ingestionService = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<IIngestionService>();
51:                 await ingestionService.RunIngestionCycleAsync(stoppingToken);
52:             }
53:             catch (OperationCanceledException) when (stoppingToken.IsCancellationRequested)
54:             {
55:                 _logger.LogInformation("Ingestion Background Service is stopping.");
56:                 break;
57:             }
58:             catch (Exception ex)
59:             {
60:                 _logger.LogError(ex, "Unhandled exception in ingestion cycle. Will retry after interval.");
61:             }
62: 
63:             // Wait for the configured interval before the next run.
64:             if (!stoppingToken.IsCancellationRequested)
65:             {
66:                 _logger.LogInformation("Next ingestion cycle in {Interval}.", _interval);
67:                 await Task.Delay(_interval, stoppingToken);
68:             }
69:         }
70:     }
71: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
 3: using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
 4: using PositiveNews.Application.Interfaces;
 5: using PositiveNews.Infrastructure.BackgroundJobs;
 6: using PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence;
 7: using PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Services;
 8: 
 9: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure;
10: 
11: /// <summary>
12: /// Clean Registration Pattern for the Infrastructure layer.
13: /// Call this single method from WebApi's Program.cs.
14: /// </summary>
15: public static class DependencyInjection
16: {
17:     public static IServiceCollection AddInfrastructureServices(
18:         this IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration configuration)
19:     {
20:         // EF Core with SQL Server
21:         services.AddDbContext<AppDbContext>(options =>
22:             options.UseSqlServer(
23:                 configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection"),
24:                 sqlOptions =>
25:                 {
26:                     sqlOptions.MigrationsAssembly(typeof(AppDbContext).Assembly.FullName);
27:                     sqlOptions.EnableRetryOnFailure(maxRetryCount: 3);
28:                 }));
29: 
30:         // HttpClient for RSS feed fetching.
31:         // Configured with a polite User-Agent and a reasonable timeout.
32:         services.AddHttpClient("RssFeedClient", client =>
33:         {
34:             client.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30);
35:             client.DefaultRequestHeaders.UserAgent.ParseAdd(
36:                 "PositiveNews/1.0 (+https://github.com/positivenews; Academic Project)");
37:             client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Accept.ParseAdd("application/rss+xml, application/xml, text/xml");
38:         });
39: 
40:         // Application services
41:         services.AddScoped<IRssFeedReader, RssFeedReader>();
42:         services.AddScoped<IIngestionService, IngestionService>();
43: 
44:         // Background services
45:         services.AddHostedService<IngestionBackgroundService>();
46: 
47:         return services;
48:     }
49: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/AppDbContext.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 3: 
 4: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence;
 5: 
 6: public class AppDbContext : DbContext
 7: {
 8:     public AppDbContext(DbContextOptions<AppDbContext> options) : base(options) { }
 9: 
10:     // Identity
11:     public DbSet<Role> Roles => Set<Role>();
12:     public DbSet<User> Users => Set<User>();
13:     public DbSet<UserRole> UserRoles => Set<UserRole>();
14:     public DbSet<UserFeedPreference> UserFeedPreferences => Set<UserFeedPreference>();
15:     public DbSet<UserSourceFilter> UserSourceFilters => Set<UserSourceFilter>();
16:     public DbSet<UserTopicFilter> UserTopicFilters => Set<UserTopicFilter>();
17: 
18:     // Catalog
19:     public DbSet<Topic> Topics => Set<Topic>();
20:     public DbSet<Source> Sources => Set<Source>();
21:     public DbSet<ArticleMetadata> ArticlesMetadata => Set<ArticleMetadata>();
22:     public DbSet<ArticleContent> ArticlesContent => Set<ArticleContent>();
23:     public DbSet<ArticleTopic> ArticleTopics => Set<ArticleTopic>();
24:     public DbSet<IngestionRun> IngestionRuns => Set<IngestionRun>();
25: 
26:     // Community
27:     public DbSet<Comment> Comments => Set<Comment>();
28: 
29:     // Admin
30:     public DbSet<AuditLog> AuditLogs => Set<AuditLog>();
31: 
32:     protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
33:     {
34:         // Applies all IEntityTypeConfiguration<T> from this assembly.
35:         modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(AppDbContext).Assembly);
36: 
37:         base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);
38:     }
39: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/ArticleContentConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class ArticleContentConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<ArticleContent>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<ArticleContent> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("ArticlesContent", SchemaNames.Catalog);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(c => c.Id);
15: 
16:         // Id is NOT identity — it shares the value from ArticleMetadata.
17:         builder.Property(c => c.Id).ValueGeneratedNever();
18: 
19:         builder.Property(c => c.ContentRaw).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
20:         builder.Property(c => c.ContentClean).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
21:         builder.Property(c => c.SummaryShort).HasMaxLength(2000);
22:     }
23: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/ArticleMetadataConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class ArticleMetadataConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<ArticleMetadata>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<ArticleMetadata> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("ArticlesMetadata", SchemaNames.Catalog);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(a => a.Id);
15:         builder.Property(a => a.ExternalId).HasMaxLength(300);
16:         builder.Property(a => a.Title).HasMaxLength(500).IsRequired();
17:         builder.Property(a => a.Author).HasMaxLength(300);
18:         builder.Property(a => a.Url).HasMaxLength(1000).IsRequired();
19:         builder.Property(a => a.ImageUrl).HasMaxLength(1000);
20:         builder.Property(a => a.PublishedAt).HasDefaultValueSql("sysutcdatetime()");
21:         builder.Property(a => a.IngestedAt).HasDefaultValueSql("sysutcdatetime()");
22:         builder.Property(a => a.PositivityScore).HasColumnType("decimal(5,4)");
23:         builder.Property(a => a.ViewCount).HasDefaultValue(0L);
24:         builder.Property(a => a.LanguageCode).HasMaxLength(10).HasDefaultValue("und");
25:         builder.Property(a => a.RegionCode).HasMaxLength(10).HasDefaultValue("Global");
26:         builder.Property(a => a.IsActive).HasDefaultValue(true);
27: 
28:         // Check constraint
29:         builder.ToTable(t => t.HasCheckConstraint(
30:             "CK_Articles_Positivity", "[PositivityScore] BETWEEN 0.0000 AND 1.0000"));
31: 
32:         // Deduplication unique index
33:         builder.HasIndex(a => new { a.SourceId, a.ExternalId })
34:                .IsUnique()
35:                .HasFilter("[ExternalId] IS NOT NULL")
36:                .HasDatabaseName("IX_ArticlesMeta_Source_ExternalId");
37: 
38:         // Feed performance index
39:         builder.HasIndex(a => new { a.LanguageCode, a.RegionCode, a.PublishedAt })
40:                .IsDescending(false, false, true)
41:                .HasFilter("[IsActive] = 1")
42:                .HasDatabaseName("IX_ArticlesMeta_Feed_Date");
43: 
44:         // Source lookup index
45:         builder.HasIndex(a => a.SourceId)
46:                .HasDatabaseName("IX_ArticlesMeta_SourceId");
47: 
48:         // Relationships
49:         builder.HasOne(a => a.Source)
50:                .WithMany(s => s.Articles)
51:                .HasForeignKey(a => a.SourceId)
52:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
53: 
54:         builder.HasOne(a => a.Moderator)
55:                .WithMany()
56:                .HasForeignKey(a => a.ModeratedBy)
57:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.NoAction);
58: 
59:         builder.HasOne(a => a.Content)
60:                .WithOne(c => c.Metadata)
61:                .HasForeignKey<ArticleContent>(c => c.Id)
62:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
63:     }
64: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/ArticleTopicConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class ArticleTopicConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<ArticleTopic>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<ArticleTopic> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("ArticleTopics", SchemaNames.Catalog);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(at => new { at.ArticleId, at.TopicId });
15: 
16:         builder.HasOne(at => at.Article)
17:                .WithMany(a => a.ArticleTopics)
18:                .HasForeignKey(at => at.ArticleId)
19:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
20: 
21:         builder.HasOne(at => at.Topic)
22:                .WithMany(t => t.ArticleTopics)
23:                .HasForeignKey(at => at.TopicId)
24:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
25: 
26:         // Reverse lookup index
27:         builder.HasIndex(at => at.TopicId)
28:                .HasDatabaseName("IX_ArticleTopics_Topic_Lookup");
29:     }
30: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/AuditLogConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: using PositiveNews.Domain.Enums;
 6: 
 7: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 8: 
 9: public class AuditLogConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<AuditLog>
10: {
11:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<AuditLog> builder)
12:     {
13:         builder.ToTable("AuditLogs", SchemaNames.Admin);
14: 
15:         builder.HasKey(al => al.Id);
16: 
17:         builder.Property(al => al.EntityType)
18:                .HasMaxLength(50)
19:                .HasConversion<string>();
20: 
21:         builder.ToTable(t => t.HasCheckConstraint(
22:             "CK_Audit_Entity", "[EntityType] IN ('Article', 'Comment', 'User', 'Source')"));
23: 
24:         builder.Property(al => al.ChangedField).HasMaxLength(100);
25:         builder.Property(al => al.OldValue).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
26:         builder.Property(al => al.NewValue).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
27:         builder.Property(al => al.Reason).HasMaxLength(500);
28:         builder.Property(al => al.Note).HasMaxLength(1000);
29:         builder.Property(al => al.CreatedAt).HasDefaultValueSql("sysutcdatetime()");
30: 
31:         builder.HasOne(al => al.Moderator)
32:                .WithMany()
33:                .HasForeignKey(al => al.ModeratorId)
34:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.NoAction);
35: 
36:         // History lookup index
37:         builder.HasIndex(al => new { al.EntityType, al.EntityId, al.CreatedAt })
38:                .IsDescending(false, false, true)
39:                .HasDatabaseName("IX_AuditLogs_Entity_History");
40:     }
41: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/CommentConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class CommentConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<Comment>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<Comment> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("Comments", SchemaNames.Community);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(c => c.Id);
15:         builder.Property(c => c.Content).HasMaxLength(2000).IsRequired();
16:         builder.Property(c => c.CreatedAt).HasDefaultValueSql("sysutcdatetime()");
17:         builder.Property(c => c.IsActive).HasDefaultValue(true);
18: 
19:         builder.HasOne(c => c.Article)
20:                .WithMany(a => a.Comments)
21:                .HasForeignKey(c => c.ArticleId)
22:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
23: 
24:         builder.HasOne(c => c.User)
25:                .WithMany(u => u.Comments)
26:                .HasForeignKey(c => c.UserId)
27:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.NoAction);
28: 
29:         builder.HasOne(c => c.Parent)
30:                .WithMany(c => c.Replies)
31:                .HasForeignKey(c => c.ParentId)
32:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.NoAction);
33: 
34:         builder.HasOne(c => c.Moderator)
35:                .WithMany()
36:                .HasForeignKey(c => c.ModeratedBy)
37:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.NoAction);
38: 
39:         // Thread loading index
40:         builder.HasIndex(c => new { c.ArticleId, c.CreatedAt })
41:                .HasFilter("[IsActive] = 1")
42:                .HasDatabaseName("IX_Comments_Article_Thread");
43:     }
44: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/IngestionRunConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: using PositiveNews.Domain.Enums;
 6: 
 7: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 8: 
 9: public class IngestionRunConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<IngestionRun>
10: {
11:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<IngestionRun> builder)
12:     {
13:         builder.ToTable("IngestionRuns", SchemaNames.Catalog);
14: 
15:         builder.HasKey(ir => ir.Id);
16: 
17:         // Store enum as string for readability and to match the SQL CHECK constraint.
18:         builder.Property(ir => ir.Status)
19:                .HasMaxLength(50)
20:                .HasConversion<string>();
21: 
22:         builder.ToTable(t => t.HasCheckConstraint(
23:             "CK_Ingestion_Status", "[Status] IN ('Running', 'Success', 'Failed', 'Partial')"));
24: 
25:         builder.Property(ir => ir.ItemsFetched).HasDefaultValue(0);
26:         builder.Property(ir => ir.ErrorMessage).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
27: 
28:         builder.HasOne(ir => ir.Source)
29:                .WithMany(s => s.IngestionRuns)
30:                .HasForeignKey(ir => ir.SourceId)
31:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
32:     }
33: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/RoleConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class RoleConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<Role>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<Role> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("Roles", SchemaNames.Identity);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(r => r.Id);
15:         builder.Property(r => r.Name).HasMaxLength(50).IsRequired();
16:         builder.HasIndex(r => r.Name).IsUnique();
17:     }
18: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/SourceConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class SourceConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<Source>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<Source> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("Sources", SchemaNames.Catalog);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(s => s.Id);
15:         builder.Property(s => s.Name).HasMaxLength(200).IsRequired();
16:         builder.Property(s => s.Description).HasMaxLength(1000);
17:         builder.Property(s => s.BaseUrl).HasMaxLength(500).IsRequired();
18:         builder.Property(s => s.FeedUrl).HasMaxLength(500);
19:         builder.Property(s => s.LogoUrl).HasMaxLength(500);
20:         builder.Property(s => s.ApiEndpoint).HasMaxLength(500);
21:         builder.Property(s => s.ApiEncryptedKey).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
22:         builder.Property(s => s.TrustScore).HasColumnType("decimal(5,2)").HasDefaultValue(1.0m);
23: 
24:         builder.ToTable(t => t.HasCheckConstraint("CK_Sources_Trust", "[TrustScore] >= 0.00"));
25: 
26:         builder.Property(s => s.DefaultLanguageCode).HasMaxLength(10).HasDefaultValue("en");
27:         builder.Property(s => s.CreatedAt).HasDefaultValueSql("sysutcdatetime()");
28:         builder.Property(s => s.IsActive).HasDefaultValue(true);
29: 
30:         builder.HasOne(s => s.Moderator)
31:                .WithMany()
32:                .HasForeignKey(s => s.ModeratedBy)
33:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.NoAction);
34:     }
35: }

File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/TopicConfiguration.cs

 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class TopicConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<Topic>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<Topic> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("Topics", SchemaNames.Catalog);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(t => t.Id);
15:         builder.Property(t => t.Name).HasMaxLength(200).IsRequired();
16:         builder.Property(t => t.Slug).HasMaxLength(200).IsRequired();
17:         builder.HasIndex(t => t.Slug).IsUnique();
18:         builder.Property(t => t.Description).HasMaxLength(500);
19:     }
20: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/UserConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class UserConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<User>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<User> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("Users", SchemaNames.Identity);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(u => u.Id);
15:         builder.Property(u => u.Email).HasMaxLength(300).IsRequired();
16:         builder.HasIndex(u => u.Email).IsUnique();
17:         builder.Property(u => u.EmailConfirmed).HasDefaultValue(false);
18:         builder.Property(u => u.Name).HasMaxLength(200).IsRequired();
19:         builder.Property(u => u.PasswordHash).HasColumnType("nvarchar(max)");
20:         builder.Property(u => u.FailedLoginCount).HasDefaultValue(0);
21:         builder.Property(u => u.AvatarPictureUrl).HasMaxLength(1000);
22:         builder.Property(u => u.CreatedAt).HasDefaultValueSql("sysutcdatetime()");
23:         builder.Property(u => u.IsActive).HasDefaultValue(true);
24: 
25:         builder.HasOne(u => u.Moderator)
26:                .WithMany()
27:                .HasForeignKey(u => u.ModeratedBy)
28:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.NoAction);
29:     }
30: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/UserFeedPreferenceConfiguration.cs
================
 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class UserFeedPreferenceConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<UserFeedPreference>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<UserFeedPreference> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("UserFeedPreferences", SchemaNames.Identity);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(p => p.UserId);
15:         builder.Property(p => p.MinPositivity).HasColumnType("decimal(3,2)").HasDefaultValue(0.5m);
16:         builder.Property(p => p.SortBy).HasMaxLength(50).HasDefaultValue("Date");
17:         builder.Property(p => p.LanguageCode).HasMaxLength(10);
18:         builder.Property(p => p.RegionCode).HasMaxLength(10);
19: 
20:         builder.ToTable(t => t.HasCheckConstraint(
21:             "CK_UserPrefs_MinPositivity", "[MinPositivity] BETWEEN 0.00 AND 1.00"));
22: 
23:         builder.HasOne(p => p.User)
24:                .WithOne(u => u.FeedPreference)
25:                .HasForeignKey<UserFeedPreference>(p => p.UserId)
26:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
27:     }
28: }

File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/UserRoleConfiguration.cs

 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class UserRoleConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<UserRole>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<UserRole> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("UserRoles", SchemaNames.Identity);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(ur => new { ur.UserId, ur.RoleId });
15: 
16:         builder.HasOne(ur => ur.User)
17:                .WithMany(u => u.UserRoles)
18:                .HasForeignKey(ur => ur.UserId)
19:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);

 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;

 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class UserSourceFilterConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<UserSourceFilter>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<UserSourceFilter> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("UserSourceFilters", SchemaNames.Identity);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(usf => new { usf.UserId, usf.SourceId });
15: 
16:         builder.HasOne(usf => usf.User)
17:                .WithMany(u => u.SourceFilters)
18:                .HasForeignKey(usf => usf.UserId)
19:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
20:

File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/UserTopicFilterConfiguration.cs

 1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
 2: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
 3: using PositiveNews.Domain.Constants;
 4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations;
 7: 
 8: public class UserTopicFilterConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<UserTopicFilter>
 9: {
10:     public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<UserTopicFilter> builder)
11:     {
12:         builder.ToTable("UserTopicFilters", SchemaNames.Identity);
13: 
14:         builder.HasKey(utf => new { utf.UserId, utf.TopicId });
15: 
16:         builder.HasOne(utf => utf.User)
17:                .WithMany(u => u.TopicFilters)
18:                .HasForeignKey(utf => utf.UserId)
19:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
20: 
21:         builder.HasOne(utf => utf.Topic)
22:                .WithMany(t => t.UserTopicFilters)
23:                .HasForeignKey(utf => utf.TopicId)
24:                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
25:     }
26: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Persistence/Seeding/DataSeeder.cs
================
  1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
  2: using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
  3: using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
  4: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
  5: 
  6: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seeding;
  7: 
  8: /// <summary>
  9: /// Applies migrations (creates DB if missing) and seeds reference data.
 10: /// Designed to be called once at application startup.
 11: /// </summary>
 12: public static class DataSeeder
 13: {
 14:     public static async Task SeedAsync(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
 15:     {
 16:         using var scope = serviceProvider.CreateScope();
 17:         var context = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<AppDbContext>();
 18:         var logger = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<ILogger<AppDbContext>>();
 19: 
 20:         logger.LogInformation("Applying database migrations (will create DB if it does not exist)...");
 21:         await context.Database.MigrateAsync();
 22:         logger.LogInformation("Database migrations applied successfully.");
 23: 
 24:         await SeedRolesAsync(context, logger);
 25:         await SeedTopicsAsync(context, logger);
 26:         await SeedSourcesAsync(context, logger);
 27:         await SeedAdminUserAsync(context, logger);
 28:     }
 29: 
 30:     private static async Task SeedRolesAsync(AppDbContext context, ILogger logger)
 31:     {
 32:         if (await context.Roles.AnyAsync()) return;
 33: 
 34:         var roles = new List<Role>
 35:         {
 36:             new() { Name = "Admin" },
 37:             new() { Name = "Moderator" },
 38:             new() { Name = "User" }
 39:         };
 40: 
 41:         context.Roles.AddRange(roles);
 42:         await context.SaveChangesAsync();
 43:         logger.LogInformation("Seeded {Count} roles.", roles.Count);
 44:     }
 45: 
 46:     private static async Task SeedTopicsAsync(AppDbContext context, ILogger logger)
 47:     {
 48:         if (await context.Topics.AnyAsync()) return;
 49: 
 50:         var topics = new List<Topic>
 51:         {
 52:             new() { Name = "Technology",       Slug = "technology",       Description = "Tech innovations and digital trends" },
 53:             new() { Name = "Health",           Slug = "health",           Description = "Wellness, medicine, and health science" },
 54:             new() { Name = "Science",          Slug = "science",          Description = "Scientific discoveries and research" },
 55:             new() { Name = "Environment",      Slug = "environment",      Description = "Climate, ecology, and conservation" },
 56:             new() { Name = "Space",            Slug = "space",            Description = "Astronomy, space exploration, and NASA" },
 57:             new() { Name = "Travel",           Slug = "travel",           Description = "Destinations, culture, and adventure" },
 58:             new() { Name = "Animals",          Slug = "animals",          Description = "Wildlife and animal stories" },
 59:             new() { Name = "Inspiring",        Slug = "inspiring",        Description = "Uplifting and motivational stories" },
 60:             new() { Name = "Arts & Culture",   Slug = "arts-culture",     Description = "Art, music, literature, and culture" },
 61:             new() { Name = "Education",        Slug = "education",        Description = "Learning, teaching, and academic breakthroughs" },
 62:             new() { Name = "Business",         Slug = "business",         Description = "Economy, startups, and corporate responsibility" },
 63:             new() { Name = "Sports",           Slug = "sports",           Description = "Athletic achievements and sports news" },
 64:             new() { Name = "General",          Slug = "general",          Description = "Uncategorized positive news" }
 65:         };
 66: 
 67:         context.Topics.AddRange(topics);
 68:         await context.SaveChangesAsync();
 69:         logger.LogInformation("Seeded {Count} topics.", topics.Count);
 70:     }
 71: 
 72:     private static async Task SeedSourcesAsync(AppDbContext context, ILogger logger)
 73:     {
 74:         if (await context.Sources.AnyAsync()) return;
 75: 
 76:         var sources = new List<Source>
 77:         {
 78:             new()
 79:             {
 80:                 Name = "Good News Network",
 81:                 BaseUrl = "https://www.goodnewsnetwork.org",
 82:                 FeedUrl = "https://www.goodnewsnetwork.org/feed/",
 83:                 TrustScore = 1.0m,
 84:                 DefaultLanguageCode = "en",
 85:                 Description = "Since 1997, the premier source of positive news."
 86:             },
 87:             new()
 88:             {
 89:                 Name = "The Optimist Daily",
 90:                 BaseUrl = "https://www.optimistdaily.com",
 91:                 FeedUrl = "https://www.optimistdaily.com/feed/",
 92:                 TrustScore = 1.0m,
 93:                 DefaultLanguageCode = "en",
 94:                 Description = "Making solutions the news."
 95:             },
 96:             new()
 97:             {
 98:                 Name = "NASA Breaking News",
 99:                 BaseUrl = "https://www.nasa.gov",
100:                 FeedUrl = "https://www.nasa.gov/rss/dyn/breaking_news.rss",
101:                 TrustScore = 1.0m,
102:                 DefaultLanguageCode = "en",
103:                 Description = "Latest news from NASA."
104:             },
105:             new()
106:             {
107:                 Name = "Space.com",
108:                 BaseUrl = "https://www.space.com",
109:                 FeedUrl = "https://www.space.com/feeds/all",
110:                 TrustScore = 0.95m,
111:                 DefaultLanguageCode = "en",
112:                 Description = "Space exploration and astronomy news."
113:             },
114:             new()
115:             {
116:                 Name = "National Geographic",
117:                 BaseUrl = "https://www.nationalgeographic.com",
118:                 FeedUrl = "https://www.nationalgeographic.com/foundation/news.rss",
119:                 TrustScore = 1.0m,
120:                 DefaultLanguageCode = "en",
121:                 Description = "Exploring and protecting our planet."
122:             },
123:             new()
124:             {
125:                 Name = "Harvard Health",
126:                 BaseUrl = "https://www.health.harvard.edu",
127:                 FeedUrl = "https://www.health.harvard.edu/blog/feed",
128:                 TrustScore = 1.0m,
129:                 DefaultLanguageCode = "en",
130:                 Description = "Trusted health information from Harvard Medical School."
131:             },
132:             new()
133:             {
134:                 Name = "Lonely Planet",
135:                 BaseUrl = "https://www.lonelyplanet.com",
136:                 FeedUrl = "https://www.lonelyplanet.com/news/feed",
137:                 TrustScore = 0.9m,
138:                 DefaultLanguageCode = "en",
139:                 Description = "Travel guides and inspiration."
140:             }
141:         };
142: 
143:         context.Sources.AddRange(sources);
144:         await context.SaveChangesAsync();
145:         logger.LogInformation("Seeded {Count} sources.", sources.Count);
146:     }
147: 
148:     private static async Task SeedAdminUserAsync(AppDbContext context, ILogger logger)
149:     {
150:         if (await context.Users.AnyAsync()) return;
151: 
152:         // Seed a system/admin user to own future moderation actions.
153:         // In production, the password hash would come from a proper Identity hasher.
154:         var adminUser = new User
155:         {
156:             Email = "admin@positivenews.local",
157:             EmailConfirmed = true,
158:             Name = "System Administrator",
159:             PasswordHash = null, // Will be set via proper Auth flow later.
160:             IsActive = true
161:         };
162: 
163:         context.Users.Add(adminUser);
164:         await context.SaveChangesAsync();
165: 
166:         var adminRole = await context.Roles.FirstAsync(r => r.Name == "Admin");
167:         context.UserRoles.Add(new UserRole { UserId = adminUser.Id, RoleId = adminRole.Id });
168:         await context.SaveChangesAsync();
169: 
170:         logger.LogInformation("Seeded admin user '{Email}' with Admin role.", adminUser.Email);
171:     }
172: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/PositiveNews.Infrastructure.csproj
================
 1: <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
 2: 
 3:   <ItemGroup>
 4:     <ProjectReference Include="..\PositiveNews.Application\PositiveNews.Application.csproj" />
 5:     <ProjectReference Include="..\PositiveNews.Domain\PositiveNews.Domain.csproj" />
 6:   </ItemGroup>
 7: 
 8:   <ItemGroup>
 9:     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore" Version="10.0.3" />
10:     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design" Version="10.0.3" />
11: 		<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Tools" Version="10.0.0">    
12:       <IncludeAssets>runtime; build; native; contentfiles; analyzers; buildtransitive</IncludeAssets>
13:       <PrivateAssets>all</PrivateAssets>
14:     </PackageReference>
15:     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer" Version="10.0.3" />
16:     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.Abstractions" Version="10.0.3" />
17:     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Http" Version="10.0.3" />
18: 	<PackageReference Include="System.ServiceModel.Syndication" Version="10.0.3" />
19:   </ItemGroup>
20: 
21:   <PropertyGroup>
22:     <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework>
23:     <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
24:     <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
25:   </PropertyGroup>
26: 
27: </Project>

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Services/IngestionService.cs
================
  1: using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
  2: using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
  3: using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
  4: using PositiveNews.Application.Interfaces;
  5: using PositiveNews.Domain.Entities;
  6: using PositiveNews.Domain.Enums;
  7: using PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence;
  8: 
  9: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Services;
 10: 
 11: /// <summary>
 12: /// Iterates over all active sources, fetches their RSS feeds, 
 13: /// deduplicates against existing articles, and persists new ones.
 14: /// </summary>
 15: public class IngestionService : IIngestionService
 16: {
 17:     private readonly IServiceScopeFactory _scopeFactory;
 18:     private readonly IRssFeedReader _feedReader;
 19:     private readonly ILogger<IngestionService> _logger;
 20: 
 21:     /// <summary>
 22:     /// Polite delay between processing individual sources to avoid hammering external servers.
 23:     /// </summary>
 24:     private static readonly TimeSpan DelayBetweenSources = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(5);
 25: 
 26:     /// <summary>
 27:     /// Small delay between persisting individual articles within a single source batch.
 28:     /// </summary>
 29:     private static readonly TimeSpan DelayBetweenArticles = TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(200);
 30: 
 31:     public IngestionService(
 32:         IServiceScopeFactory scopeFactory,
 33:         IRssFeedReader feedReader,
 34:         ILogger<IngestionService> logger)
 35:     {
 36:         _scopeFactory = scopeFactory;
 37:         _feedReader = feedReader;
 38:         _logger = logger;
 39:     }
 40: 
 41:     public async Task RunIngestionCycleAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 42:     {
 43:         _logger.LogInformation("=== Ingestion cycle started. ===");
 44: 
 45:         // Fetch the list of active sources.
 46:         List<Source> activeSources;
 47:         using (var scope = _scopeFactory.CreateScope())
 48:         {
 49:             var context = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<AppDbContext>();
 50:             activeSources = await context.Sources
 51:                 .Where(s => s.IsActive && s.FeedUrl != null)
 52:                 .AsNoTracking()
 53:                 .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
 54:         }
 55: 
 56:         _logger.LogInformation("Found {Count} active sources with feed URLs.", activeSources.Count);
 57: 
 58:         foreach (var source in activeSources)
 59:         {
 60:             if (cancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested) break;
 61: 
 62:             await ProcessSourceAsync(source, cancellationToken);
 63: 
 64:             // Polite delay between sources.
 65:             if (!cancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested)
 66:             {
 67:                 _logger.LogDebug("Waiting {Delay} before next source...", DelayBetweenSources);
 68:                 await Task.Delay(DelayBetweenSources, cancellationToken);
 69:             }
 70:         }
 71: 
 72:         _logger.LogInformation("=== Ingestion cycle completed. ===");
 73:     }
 74: 
 75:     private async Task ProcessSourceAsync(Source source, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 76:     {
 77:         _logger.LogInformation("Processing source: {SourceName} ({FeedUrl})", source.Name, source.FeedUrl);
 78: 
 79:         // Create a fresh scope (and therefore a fresh DbContext) for each source.
 80:         using var scope = _scopeFactory.CreateScope();
 81:         var context = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<AppDbContext>();
 82: 
 83:         // Create an IngestionRun record.
 84:         var run = new IngestionRun
 85:         {
 86:             SourceId = source.Id,
 87:             StartedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
 88:             Status = IngestionStatus.Running
 89:         };
 90:         context.IngestionRuns.Add(run);
 91:         await context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
 92: 
 93:         int newArticleCount = 0;
 94: 
 95:         try
 96:         {
 97:             var feedItems = await _feedReader.ReadFeedAsync(source.FeedUrl!, cancellationToken);
 98: 
 99:             if (feedItems.Count == 0)
100:             {
101:                 _logger.LogWarning("Source {SourceName} returned zero feed items.", source.Name);
102:                 run.Status = IngestionStatus.Partial;
103:                 run.ErrorMessage = "Feed returned zero items. The feed URL may be unavailable or empty.";
104:                 run.FinishedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
105:                 await context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
106:                 return;
107:             }
108: 
109:             foreach (var item in feedItems)
110:             {
111:                 if (cancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested) break;
112: 
113:                 // Deduplication: Check if this article already exists for this source.
114:                 bool alreadyExists = false;
115: 
116:                 if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.ExternalId))
117:                 {
118:                     alreadyExists = await context.ArticlesMetadata
119:                         .AnyAsync(a => a.SourceId == source.Id && a.ExternalId == item.ExternalId,
120:                                   cancellationToken);
121:                 }
122: 
123:                 if (!alreadyExists && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Link))
124:                 {
125:                     alreadyExists = await context.ArticlesMetadata
126:                         .AnyAsync(a => a.SourceId == source.Id && a.Url == item.Link,
127:                                   cancellationToken);
128:                 }
129: 
130:                 if (alreadyExists)
131:                 {
132:                     _logger.LogDebug("Skipping duplicate: {Title}", item.Title);
133:                     continue;
134:                 }
135: 
136:                 // Create the ArticleMetadata entry.
137:                 var articleMeta = new ArticleMetadata
138:                 {
139:                     SourceId = source.Id,
140:                     ExternalId = item.ExternalId,
141:                     Title = item.Title.Length > 500 ? item.Title[..500] : item.Title,
142:                     Author = item.Author,
143:                     Url = item.Link,
144:                     ImageUrl = item.ImageUrl,
145:                     PublishedAt = item.PublishedDate ?? DateTime.UtcNow,
146:                     IngestedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
147:                     LanguageCode = source.DefaultLanguageCode,
148:                     RegionCode = "Global",
149:                     IsActive = true
150:                 };
151: 
152:                 context.ArticlesMetadata.Add(articleMeta);
153:                 await context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
154: 
155:                 // Create the companion ArticleContent row (initially empty, to be filled by a future scraper).
156:                 var articleContent = new ArticleContent
157:                 {
158:                     Id = articleMeta.Id,
159:                     ContentRaw = item.Description // Store RSS description as raw content for now.
160:                 };
161:                 context.ArticlesContent.Add(articleContent);
162:                 await context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
163: 
164:                 newArticleCount++;
165:                 _logger.LogInformation("Ingested new article: [{Id}] {Title}", articleMeta.Id, articleMeta.Title);
166: 
167:                 // Small polite delay between articles.
168:                 await Task.Delay(DelayBetweenArticles, cancellationToken);
169:             }
170: 
171:             run.Status = IngestionStatus.Success;
172:             run.ItemsFetched = newArticleCount;
173:             run.FinishedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
174:             await context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
175: 
176:             _logger.LogInformation(
177:                 "Source {SourceName}: ingested {NewCount} new articles out of {TotalCount} feed items.",
178:                 source.Name, newArticleCount, feedItems.Count);
179:         }
180:         catch (OperationCanceledException)
181:         {
182:             _logger.LogWarning("Ingestion for {SourceName} was cancelled.", source.Name);
183:             run.Status = IngestionStatus.Partial;
184:             run.ErrorMessage = "Operation was cancelled.";
185:             run.ItemsFetched = newArticleCount;
186:             run.FinishedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
187:             await context.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken.None); // Save even on cancellation.
188:         }
189:         catch (Exception ex)
190:         {
191:             _logger.LogError(ex, "Error ingesting source {SourceName}.", source.Name);
192:             run.Status = IngestionStatus.Failed;
193:             run.ErrorMessage = ex.Message.Length > 4000 ? ex.Message[..4000] : ex.Message;
194:             run.ItemsFetched = newArticleCount;
195:             run.FinishedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
196:             await context.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken.None);
197:         }
198:     }
199: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.Infrastructure/Services/RssFeedReader.cs
================
  1: using System.ServiceModel.Syndication;
  2: using System.Xml;
  3: using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
  4: using PositiveNews.Application.DTOs;
  5: using PositiveNews.Application.Interfaces;
  6: using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
  7: 
  8: namespace PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Services;
  9: 
 10: /// <summary>
 11: /// Fetches and parses an RSS/Atom feed using System.ServiceModel.Syndication.
 12: /// This is the only class that makes HTTP calls to external sources.
 13: /// </summary>
 14: public class RssFeedReader : IRssFeedReader
 15: {
 16:     private readonly IHttpClientFactory _httpClientFactory;
 17:     private readonly ILogger<RssFeedReader> _logger;
 18: 
 19:     public RssFeedReader(IHttpClientFactory httpClientFactory, ILogger<RssFeedReader> logger)
 20:     {
 21:         _httpClientFactory = httpClientFactory;
 22:         _logger = logger;
 23:     }
 24: 
 25:     public async Task<IReadOnlyList<RssFeedItemDto>> ReadFeedAsync(
 26:         string feedUrl, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 27:     {
 28:         var items = new List<RssFeedItemDto>();
 29: 
 30:         try
 31:         {
 32:             var httpClient = _httpClientFactory.CreateClient("RssFeedClient");
 33:             using var response = await httpClient.GetAsync(feedUrl, cancellationToken);
 34:             response.EnsureSuccessStatusCode();
 35: 
 36:             using var stream = await response.Content.ReadAsStreamAsync(cancellationToken);
 37:             using var xmlReader = XmlReader.Create(stream, new XmlReaderSettings { Async = true });
 38: 
 39:             var feed = SyndicationFeed.Load(xmlReader);
 40:             if (feed is null)
 41:             {
 42:                 _logger.LogWarning("Feed at {FeedUrl} returned null after parsing.", feedUrl);
 43:                 return items;
 44:             }
 45: 
 46:             foreach (var syndicationItem in feed.Items)
 47:             {
 48:                 var dto = new RssFeedItemDto
 49:                 {
 50:                     Title = syndicationItem.Title?.Text ?? "(No Title)",
 51:                     Link = syndicationItem.Links.FirstOrDefault()?.Uri?.AbsoluteUri ?? string.Empty,
 52:                     Description = syndicationItem.Summary?.Text,
 53:                     Author = syndicationItem.Authors.FirstOrDefault()?.Name
 54:                               ?? syndicationItem.Authors.FirstOrDefault()?.Email,
 55:                     PublishedDate = syndicationItem.PublishDate != DateTimeOffset.MinValue
 56:                         ? syndicationItem.PublishDate.UtcDateTime
 57:                         : syndicationItem.LastUpdatedTime != DateTimeOffset.MinValue
 58:                             ? syndicationItem.LastUpdatedTime.UtcDateTime
 59:                             : null,
 60:                     ExternalId = syndicationItem.Id ?? syndicationItem.Links.FirstOrDefault()?.Uri?.AbsoluteUri,
 61:                     ImageUrl = ExtractImageUrl(syndicationItem)
 62:                 };
 63: 
 64:                 if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dto.Link))
 65:                 {
 66:                     items.Add(dto);
 67:                 }
 68:             }
 69: 
 70:             _logger.LogInformation("Parsed {Count} items from {FeedUrl}.", items.Count, feedUrl);
 71:         }
 72:         catch (Exception ex)
 73:         {
 74:             _logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to read feed from {FeedUrl}.", feedUrl);
 75:         }
 76: 
 77:         return items;
 78:     }
 79: 
 80:     /// <summary>
 81:     /// Attempts to extract an image URL from common RSS extensions like media:thumbnail,
 82:     /// media:content, or enclosure elements.
 83:     /// </summary>
 84:     private static string? ExtractImageUrl(SyndicationItem item)
 85:     {
 86:         // 1. Try media:thumbnail or media:content (common in RSS 2.0 feeds)
 87:         foreach (var extension in item.ElementExtensions)
 88:         {
 89:             if (extension.OuterName is "thumbnail" or "content"
 90:                 && extension.OuterNamespace == "http://search.yahoo.com/mrss/")
 91:             {
 92:                 var element = extension.GetObject<XmlElement>();
 93:                 var url = element?.GetAttribute("url");
 94:                 if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(url)) return url;
 95:             }
 96:         }
 97: 
 98:         // 2. Try enclosure (used by some feeds for images)
 99:         foreach (var link in item.Links)
100:         {
101:             if (link.RelationshipType == "enclosure"
102:                 && link.MediaType?.StartsWith("image/", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true)
103:             {
104:                 return link.Uri?.AbsoluteUri;
105:             }
106:         }
107: 
108:         return null;
109:     }
110: }
