 1: {
 2:   "ConnectionStrings": {
 3:     "DefaultConnection": "Server=DESKTOP-0867BVN;Database=PositiveNewsDb;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Encrypt=False;"
 4:   },
 5:   "Ingestion": {
 6:     "IntervalMinutes": 60
 7:   },
 8:   "Serilog": {
 9:     "MinimumLevel": {
10:       "Default": "Information",
11:       "Override": {
12:         "Microsoft": "Warning",
13:         "Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore": "Warning",
14:         "System": "Warning"
15:       }
16:     }
17:   },
18:   "AllowedHosts": "*"
19: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.WebApi/PositiveNews.WebApi.csproj
================
 1: <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">
 2: 
 3:   <PropertyGroup>
 4:     <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework>
 5:     <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
 6:     <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
 7:   </PropertyGroup>
 8: 
 9:   <ItemGroup>
10:     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.OpenApi" Version="3.3.1" />
11:     <PackageReference Include="Serilog.AspNetCore" Version="10.0.0" />
12:     <PackageReference Include="Serilog.Sinks.Console" Version="6.1.1" />
13:     <PackageReference Include="Serilog.Sinks.File" Version="7.0.0" />
14:     <PackageReference Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="10.1.4" />
15:   </ItemGroup>
16: 
17:   <ItemGroup>
18:     <ProjectReference Include="..\PositiveNews.Application\PositiveNews.Application.csproj" />
19:     <ProjectReference Include="..\PositiveNews.Infrastructure\PositiveNews.Infrastructure.csproj" />
20:   </ItemGroup>
21: 
22: </Project>

================
File: src/PositiveNews.WebApi/Program.cs
================
 1: using Serilog;
 2: using PositiveNews.Application;
 3: using PositiveNews.Infrastructure;
 4: using PositiveNews.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seeding;
 5: 
 6: namespace PositiveNews.WebApi;
 7: 
 8: public class Program
 9: {
10:     public static async Task Main(string[] args)
11:     {
12:         // ---------------------------------------------------------------
13:         // 1. CONFIGURE SERILOG (Bootstrap logger for startup errors)
14:         // ---------------------------------------------------------------
15:         Log.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration()
16:             .WriteTo.Console()
17:             .WriteTo.File(
18:                 path: "logs/positivenews-.log",
19:                 rollingInterval: RollingInterval.Day,
20:                 retainedFileCountLimit: 30,
21:                 outputTemplate: "{Timestamp:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff zzz} [{Level:u3}] {SourceContext}: {Message:lj}{NewLine}{Exception}")
22:             .CreateBootstrapLogger();
23: 
24:         try
25:         {
26:             Log.Information("Starting PositiveNews Web API...");
27: 
28:             var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);
29: 
30:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
31:             // 2. SERILOG — Replace default logging
32:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
33:             builder.Host.UseSerilog((context, loggerConfig) =>
34:             {
35:                 loggerConfig
36:                     .ReadFrom.Configuration(context.Configuration)
37:                     .Enrich.FromLogContext()
38:                     .WriteTo.Console()
39:                     .WriteTo.File(
40:                         path: "logs/positivenews-.log",
41:                         rollingInterval: RollingInterval.Day,
42:                         retainedFileCountLimit: 30,
43:                         outputTemplate: "{Timestamp:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff zzz} [{Level:u3}] {SourceContext}: {Message:lj}{NewLine}{Exception}");
44:             });
45: 
46:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
47:             // 3. REGISTER SERVICES (Clean Registration Pattern)
48:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
49:             builder.Services.AddApplicationServices();
50:             builder.Services.AddInfrastructureServices(builder.Configuration);
51: 
52:             builder.Services.AddControllers();
53:             builder.Services.AddEndpointsApiExplorer();
54:             builder.Services.AddSwaggerGen();
55: 
56:             var app = builder.Build();
57: 
58:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
59:             // 4. SEED DATABASE (Create if not exists + populate reference data)
60:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
61:             await DataSeeder.SeedAsync(app.Services);
62: 
63:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
64:             // 5. MIDDLEWARE PIPELINE
65:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
66:             if (app.Environment.IsDevelopment())
67:             {
68:                 app.UseSwagger();
69:                 app.UseSwaggerUI();
70:             }
71: 
72:             app.UseSerilogRequestLogging();
73:             app.UseHttpsRedirection();
74:             app.UseAuthorization();
75:             app.MapControllers();
76: 
77:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
78:             // 6. RUN
79:             // ---------------------------------------------------------------
80:             await app.RunAsync();
81:         }
82:         catch (Exception ex)
83:         {
84:             Log.Fatal(ex, "Application terminated unexpectedly.");
85:         }
86:         finally
87:         {
88:             await Log.CloseAndFlushAsync();
89:         }
90:     }
91: }

================
File: src/PositiveNews.WebApi/Properties/launchSettings.json
================
 1: {
 2:   "profiles": {
 3:     "https": {
 4:       "commandName": "Project",
 5:       "dotnetRunMessages": true,
 6:       "launchBrowser": true,
 7:       "launchUrl": "swagger",
 8:       "applicationUrl": "https://localhost:7210;http://localhost:5210",
 9:       "environmentVariables": {
10:         "ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT": "Development"
11:       }
12:     }
13:   }
14: }
